_comment: Example camera for a ~18s take. Times are seconds on the master's timeline (take them from the recording's events.json). Keys starting with _ are ignored; see camera.py's docstring for the full format.

keyframes._comment: duplicate values = hold wide while the page settles
push in on the task panel
lateral slide to the diff; omitted zoom inherits 2.2
hold keeps the previous framing until t=14, then hard-cuts to this one
